summary: Comprehensive testing of Help Topic Categories and Topics feature. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Ticketing Setup page shows 43 help topics in 8 categories, category filter pills, search bar, + Category button opens CategoryEditor modal, + Help Topic button opens HelpTopicEditor with category dropdown and tags input, Create Ticket modal has searchable HelpTopicSelector grouped by category.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ticketing/help-topic-categories returns 8 categories (Hardware & Devices, Software & OS, Network & Connectivity, Peripherals & Accessories, Service Requests, Warranty & AMC, Commercial & Billing, General)
Backend: POST /api/ticketing/help-topic-categories creates a new category successfully
Backend: PUT /api/ticketing/help-topic-categories/{id} updates category name/description/color
Backend: DELETE /api/ticketing/help-topic-categories/{id} deletes category and verifies removal
Backend: GET /api/ticketing/help-topics returns 43+ topics (confirmed 43 topics)
Backend: Topics have category_id field for grouping (20+ topics with category_id)
Backend: Topics have tags array for search functionality (20+ topics with tags)
Backend: Topics can be grouped by category (5+ categories with topics)
Backend: Topics are searchable by tags (laptop, printer tags work)
Backend: Create help topic with tags and category_id works
Backend: Update help topic tags works
Backend: Categories have correct topic counts
Backend: All 8 expected category names exist
Frontend: Ticketing Setup page loads with Help Topics tab visible
Frontend: Category filter pills shown (All, Hardware & Devices, Software & OS, etc.) - 9 buttons
Frontend: Search bar present with placeholder 'Search topics by name, description, or tags...'
Frontend: + Category button opens CategoryEditor modal with Name, Description, Icon, Color, Order fields
Frontend: + Help Topic button opens HelpTopicEditor with Category dropdown, Priority, Form, Workflow, SLA Policy, Search Tags
Frontend: Topics grouped by category with section headers (Commercial & Billing, support, Peripherals & Accessories visible)
Frontend: Topic cards show Workflow/Form/Device badges and tags
Frontend: Tags can be added and removed in HelpTopicEditor
Frontend: Create Ticket modal opens with HelpTopicSelector grouped by category
Frontend: HelpTopicSelector shows search input 'Search by name, description, or tags...'
Frontend: HelpTopicSelector dropdown shows category headers (COMMERCIAL, SUPPORT, HARDWARE)
Frontend: HelpTopicSelector search filters topics (typing 'laptop' shows Laptop Repair under HARDWARE)

categories: Warranty & AMC (0 topics - existing warranty topics are in 'support' category)

elements: Category filter pills (9 buttons including All)

help_topic_editor.tags_input: Add tag with input field and Add button, tags shown as pills with X to remove

features: Searchable dropdown with 'Search by name, description, or tags...' placeholder
Topics grouped by category (COMMERCIAL, SUPPORT, HARDWARE headers)
Search filters topics across name, description, and tags
Topic options show name and description snippet

seed_data_creation: Comprehensive topics were seeded via POST /api/ticketing/seed-comprehensive-topics (already called). 8 categories and 30+ new topics created on top of existing topics = 43 total.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Help Topic Categories CRUD fully tested. 8 categories exist (Hardware, Software, Network, Peripherals, Service, Warranty, Commercial, General). 43 help topics with category_id and tags fields. Frontend Ticketing Setup page at /admin/ticketing-config shows category filter pills, search bar, and grouped topics. CategoryEditor and HelpTopicEditor modals work correctly with tags functionality. Create Ticket modal's HelpTopicSelector shows topics grouped by category with search.
